overall.description: Gameplay footage from a truck simulator showing a Mercedes truck driving on snow-covered highways during a heavy snowstorm. The driver navigates through concrete overpasses, a traffic roundabout, and a toll plaza while windshield wipers actively clear accumulating snow from the windshield.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered multi-lane highway with concrete overpasses

events.description: passing under first concrete highway overpass, temporarily blocking sky view
passing under second highway overpass structure

agents.ego_description: driving steadily on the snowy highway in the right lane, maintaining consistent speed

notable_agents.action: red truck traveling in the left lane, gradually overtaking and passing by

entered.detail: concrete highway overpass spanning across the road with support pillars
concrete barrier with metal rail along the left side of the highway
snow-covered earthen slope rising on the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: The truck travels along a snow-covered multi-lane highway, passing under consecutive concrete overpasses. Snow accumulates on the windshield as the wipers move continuously. A red truck passes by in the left lane while snow-covered embankments line the right side of the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway exit ramp leading to traffic roundabout

events.description: taking the highway exit ramp, curving to the right and leaving the main highway
entering the roundabout, navigating the circular intersection with snow-covered center

agents.ego_description: steering the truck through the curved exit ramp and carefully navigating the roundabout

entered.detail: circular traffic intersection with snow-covered center island and directional markings
green directional road signs indicating exit routes

segments.scene_description: The truck takes a right exit ramp from the highway, transitioning from the straight multi-lane road to a curved approach. The vehicle enters a roundabout with a snow-covered center island, navigating the circular traffic pattern before preparing to exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway with snow-covered forest and power lines

events.description: exiting roundabout and merging back onto the main highway

agents.ego_description: accelerating on the highway after the roundabout, approaching the toll plaza area

notable_agents.action: white car traveling ahead in the same lane, maintaining distance

entered.detail: tall electricity pylons with wires running parallel to the highway
dense pine trees heavily covered in snow lining the highway

segments.scene_description: After exiting the roundabout, the truck merges onto a straight highway section flanked by snow-covered forests. Power lines run parallel to the road on the right, while a white car travels ahead in the distance. The landscape is blanketed in white with reduced visibility from falling snow.

scene_state.functional_zone: toll plaza with multiple payment booths

events.description: approaching the toll plaza, slowing down for the toll booth lanes
passing through the toll booth lane and barrier gate

agents.ego_description: slowing down to navigate through the toll plaza, proceeding through the automated toll gate

entered.detail: row of toll booths with overhead canopies and payment stations
automated barrier gates at each toll lane

segments.scene_description: The truck approaches a toll plaza with multiple booth lanes, slowing down to pass through. The toll booths feature overhead canopies and barrier gates. After passing through the toll gate, the vehicle continues onto the highway extension.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway continuing past the toll area

agents.ego_description: continuing on the highway after passing the toll plaza, resuming steady cruising speed

entered.detail: metal guardrail along the left shoulder of the highway

segments.scene_description: Having cleared the toll plaza, the truck continues along the open highway. Metal guardrails line the left side while snow-covered fields extend to the right. The road stretches ahead through the wintry landscape with light traffic and ongoing snowfall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a heavy snowstorm, transitioning from a structured highway system into an open, wintry rural landscape. It begins on a multi-lane highway passing under concrete overpasses, where windshield wipers struggle against accumulating snow as a red truck glides past in the left lane. As the vehicle takes a right exit ramp, the scene shifts from the straight road into a curved roundabout with a snow-covered center island before merging onto a straight stretch flanked by dense, white forests and parallel power lines. The camera then approaches a toll plaza, slowing down to navigate through the overhead canopies and barrier gates of the booth lanes. Finally, the truck clears the plaza and accelerates onto an open highway extension, moving past metal guardrails and vast snow-covered fields that stretch toward the horizon.
